description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI Tests that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow has two jobs: test-msvc-cppwinrt and build-nuget. The test-msvc-cppwinrt job runs on a windows-latest environment with a matrix strategy for x86, x64, and arm64 architectures and Debug and Release configurations. It checks out the repository, runs tests with MSVC, uploads test logs, and checks for test failures. The build-nuget job builds a NuGet package with MSVC, checks out the repository, restores and builds the package, and uploads the resulting NuGet package as an artifact.
